chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D-745 of 2025 Mst. Haseena & another vs Province of Sindh & others. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 03.12.2025. Mr. Shahnawaz Ali Kumbhar, advocate along with petitioners Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, AAG. = The petitioners have entered into marriage of their own free will. Today, the Investigating Officer present in Court recorded the statement of the petitioner, Mst. Haseena, who stated that she has neither been kidnapped nor forced by anyone and that she is living voluntarily with her husband, expressed her desire to continue living with him. That being the case, as the subject crime needs to be disposed of under ‘C-class’ as recommended by the Investigating Officer, a summary report under ‘C-class’ shall be submitted to the concerned Magistrate for disposal in accordance with the statement of the petitioner recorded today. Accordingly, this petition stands disposed of. It is further ordered that no harassment shall be caused to the petitioners by the police or any private respondents, and the petitioners shall be provided protection in accordance with the law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
